title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: Kundan
subTitle: An innocent girl from Jhansi gets a teachers job in a government school in a nearby village called Rudrapur.She relocates to the village but is shocked to find a hostile reception from the village zamindar and his touts. On the day of Raksha Bandhan.

title: Farz
subTitle: Gopal, a secret agent, investigates the death of his colleague who possessed evidence against a known terrorist. Gopal and Kamla embark on a journey to find the traitor.

title: Sikka
subTitle: In order to further strengthen their friendship, two friends marry their kin to each other. But when one of them cannot shake their illegal habits, the wedding is threatened.

title: Pyar Ke Kabil
subTitle: Twin siblings are kept apart from each other after their parents separate. However, years later, the twins reunite and decide to switch roles in order to bring their parents back together.

title: Zakhmi Aurat
subTitle: Determined to exact revenge on the goons who gangraped her, Inspector Kiran Dutt, takes matters into her own hands as the law fails to give her justice.

title: Majaal
subTitle: Vijay Kumar, an orphan, is brought up by an advocate. While he falls in love with his daughter and marries her, he struggles to cope with the humiliation he faces from her family.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
subTitle: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: 15th August
subTitle: Nagpal kills Chaudhry and his son, Ram, a military officer. Chaudhry's second son, Vikram, vows to destroy Nagpal who is all set to become the Chief Minister on the upcoming Indian Independence Day.

title: 15th August
subTitle: Nagpal kills Chaudhry and his son, Ram, a military officer. Chaudhry's second son, Vikram, vows to destroy Nagpal who is all set to become the Chief Minister on the upcoming Indian Independence Day.

title: Yes Boss
subTitle: Rahul's boss, Siddharth, is a womaniser who exploits Rahul into helping him win over Seema. However, Rahul ends up falling for Seema and is torn between his career aspirations and her.

title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Sikandar Sadak Ka
subTitle: When Sikander, a union worker, tries to stop his employer's misdeeds, the authorities jail him. After his release, Sikander is determined to seek revenge.

title: Sikandar Sadak Ka
subTitle: When Sikander, a union worker, tries to stop his employer's misdeeds, the authorities jail him. After his release, Sikander is determined to seek revenge.

title: Keemat
subTitle: After two thugs accidentally kill a man, they hide the truth from his family and try to save his village from the torments of an evil landlord in order to redeem themselves.

title: Gambler
subTitle: Though Inspector Dayashanker is lazy, he unwittingly unearths a criminal conspiracy and becomes the pride of his division overnight. However, a local gangsters turn his life into a nightmare.

title: Ram Balram
subTitle: Unaware of his evil intentions and his role in killing their parents, two brothers Ram and Balram fall victim to their deceitful uncle. They must unite to foil his plans of gaining wealth.

title: Police Aur Mujrim
subTitle: After DSP Vishal arrests two thugs, their boss kidnaps the commissioner's daughter. But after Vishal rescues the girl and jails the thugs, they return to hurt Vishal and the commissioner's families.

title: Jaan Se Pyaara
subTitle: Inspector Jai balances working as a cop with taking care of his mother and a brother with developmental disabilities. But when he arrests a local don, he starts to fear for his family's safety.
